name: hive-2d-brain-build.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Hive Mind 2D Brain — How It's Built'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Canvas-rendered cerebrum silhouette with per-lobe activity glow'.

Four boxes flowing horizontally with arrows, cyan #4FC3F7 borders:

1. STEP 1 — CANVAS
   Title: 'HTML5 <canvas> 2D context'
   Body lines: 'no WebGL, no Three.js', 'pure 2D path drawing', 'cheap on battery'

2. STEP 2 — SHAPES
   Title: 'Cerebrum silhouette + lobes'
   Body lines: 'frontal / parietal / temporal / occipital', 'gyri texture as bezier curves', 'soft inner shadow per region'

3. STEP 3 — DOTS
   Title: 'Activity dots per lobe'
   Body lines: 'one dot per hive_mind row', 'placed inside the lobe shape', 'fade with row age'

4. STEP 4 — HOVER
   Title: 'Lobe stats panel'
   Body lines: 'hover a lobe → tooltip', 'shows entry count + per-agent breakdown'

A pink #F48FB1 box on the right titled 'WHY 2D' with body: 'used as fallback when WebGL is disabled', 'lighter on the GPU', 'identical data source to 3D'.

Mint #81C784 box at the bottom titled 'OUTPUT' with body: 'rendered by BrainGraph2D', 'instant repaint on filter change'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Hive Mind 2D'.

name: hive-mind-data-flow.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Hive Mind — End-to-End Data Flow'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'How an agent action lands on the brain'.

Five boxes flowing horizontally with arrows. From left to right:

1. SOURCE (blue #64B5F6 border)
   Title: 'Agent action'
   Body: 'mission task complete', 'war-room reply', 'tool call', 'scheduled run'

2. WRITE (cyan #4FC3F7 border)
   Title: 'logToHiveMind()'
   Body: 'INSERT INTO hive_mind', 'columns: agent_id, chat_id, action, summary, artifacts'

3. STREAM (cyan #4FC3F7 border)
   Title: 'SSE channel'
   Body: '/api/hive-mind/stream', 'broadcasts insertion to every open dashboard tab'

4. RENDER (amber #FFB74D border)
   Title: 'BrainGraph dispatch'
   Body: '3D variant: parents new dot, fires synapse arc', '2D variant: increments lobe counter'

5. OUTPUT (mint #81C784 border)
   Title: 'Visible activity'
   Body: 'glow pulse', 'rail entry update', 'lobe stat refresh'

A lavender #B39DDB box below titled 'GATING' with body: 'war-room turns: skip if reply <25 chars', 'skip if meeting has no chat_id (legacy meetings)', 'dedupe via assistantInserted on retry replays'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Hive Mind data flow'.

name: mission-control-flow.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Mission Control — Task Lifecycle'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'From inbox card to history drawer'.

Layout: a left column INBOX, then a horizontal kanban of agents (MAIN / RESEARCH / COMMS / CONTENT / OPS), and a right column HISTORY. Use boxes with these colors:

- INBOX (blue #64B5F6 border)
  Title: 'Unassigned tasks'
  Body: 'New Task modal: title + prompt + priority', 'drag to a column to reassign', 'or click Auto-assign'

- AUTO-ASSIGN (amber #FFB74D border, sitting between INBOX and the kanban)
  Title: 'Gemini classifier'
  Body: 'reads title + prompt', 'returns best-fit agent_id', 'one call per task or bulk for all unassigned'

- KANBAN COLUMNS (cyan #4FC3F7 border, narrow)
  Five thin columns labeled: MAIN, RESEARCH, COMMS, CONTENT, OPS
  Each shows a stack of two task cards with title + status pill (running / done)

- HISTORY (mint #81C784 border)
  Title: 'Completed → History'
  Body: 'tasks linger 30 min in their column', 'then move to History drawer', 'paginated, with full result text'

A pink #F48FB1 box at the bottom-left titled 'LAYOUT' with body: 'Layout menu: uniform / fit / reset column widths', 'drag column borders to resize', 'order persists in dashboard_settings'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Mission Control'.

name: scheduled-v2.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Scheduled Tasks — v2'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Cron, in plain English, with a visual editor'.

Four boxes in a horizontal flow, cyan #4FC3F7 borders:

1. INPUT — Title 'Cron expression'
   Body lines: '0 9 * * 1-5', 'or natural language: "every weekday at 9am"'

2. PARSE — Title 'cronstrue + custom'
   Body lines: 'render plain English: "Every weekday at 9:00 AM"', 'next run countdown updated each tick'

3. EDIT — Title 'Visual time-of-day picker'
   Body lines: 'pick days of the week (M T W T F S S)', 'pick hour:minute via wheel', 'edits write back to cron syntax'

4. OUTPUT — Title 'Scheduled list'
   Body lines: 'pause / resume / delete inline', 'last result snippet expanded on click', 'bulk select + delete'

A lavender #B39DDB box below titled 'PER-AGENT' with body: 'every scheduled task has an agent tag (@main / @comms / ...)' and 'task fires inside that agent process, scoped to its memory'.

An amber #FFB74D box on the right titled 'PRIVACY' with body: 'blur toggle hides task prompts in screenshots'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Scheduled v2'.

name: agent-create-wizard.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Agent Creation Wizard'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Three steps from BotFather to running agent'.

Three large boxes laid out horizontally with arrows, each cyan #4FC3F7 border:

1. STEP 1 — TEMPLATE
   Title: 'Pick a template'
   Body lines: 'comms / content / ops / research / blank', 'each loads a default CLAUDE.md', 'debounced ID validation against existing agents'

2. STEP 2 — TOKEN
   Title: 'Telegram bot token'
   Body lines: 'paste BotFather token', 'wizard hits getMe to validate', 'shows bot username + photo on success'

3. STEP 3 — ACTIVATE
   Title: 'Summary + activate'
   Body lines: 'reviews name, model, token env var', 'click Activate → writes agent.yaml + .env', 'launchd plist installed and started'

A pink #F48FB1 box on the right titled 'BOTFATHER HELP' with body: 'copy-to-clipboard /newbot template', 'inline screenshots of the BotFather flow' .

A mint #81C784 box at the bottom titled 'POST-CREATE' with body: 'message your new bot /start', 'agent CLAUDE.md and avatar editable from dashboard', 'remove with one click'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Agent wizard'.

name: avatar-resolver.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Avatar Resolver — Priority Chain'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'One source of truth for every render site'.

A vertical priority list, top-down, with each box showing the priority slot and what it resolves. Use cyan #4FC3F7 for default sources, amber #FFB74D for fallback, mint #81C784 for the final output.

1. PRIORITY 1 (cyan)
   Title: 'Mutable user-owned'
   Body: 'STORE_DIR/avatars/main.png (main)', 'resolveAgentDir(id)/avatar.png (sub-agents)'

2. PRIORITY 2 (cyan)
   Title: 'Bundled meet variant'
   Body: 'warroom/avatars/<id>-meet.png', 'only when ctx.context === meet (Daily.co tile)'

3. PRIORITY 3 (cyan)
   Title: 'Bundled default art'
   Body: 'warroom/avatars/<id>.png', 'curated pop-art, ships in the repo'

4. PRIORITY 4 (amber)
   Title: 'Telegram getMe → getFile'
   Body: 'fired only on cache miss for sub-agents', '24h .no-avatar flag on miss', 'never overwrites bundled namespace'

5. RESULT (mint)
   Title: 'ResolvedAvatar | null'
   Body: 'absPath, mtimeMs, size, source', 'caller renders or 204 fallback'

A lavender #B39DDB box on the right titled 'HTTP CONTRACT' with body: '400 invalid id', '404 unknown agent', '204 no avatar resolved', '200 + ETag on hit'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Avatar resolver'.

name: warroom-text-flow.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'War Room — Text Mode'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Multi-agent group chat with /standup, /discuss, and ad-hoc rosters'.

Left column AGENTS RAIL (cyan #4FC3F7 border) showing six small avatar tiles labeled main, meta, comms, content, ops, research, with status dots and last-seen lines.

Center wide box COMPOSER (amber #FFB74D border) with body: 'Message the team — try /standup or @agent', 'mention an agent with @id to talk to them directly', 'team chimes in when relevant'.

Right tall box ROUTER (cyan #4FC3F7 border) showing a small flowchart:
  - input: user message
  - branch 1: /standup or /discuss → pickSlashRoster
  - branch 2: @-mention → primary = mentioned agent
  - branch 3: free text → router classifier picks primary

Below, a horizontal pair:
  - mint #81C784 box LIFECYCLE: 'primary speaks first, full budget', 'up to 2 interveners chime in (gated by classifier)', 'turn_complete event closes the round'
  - pink #F48FB1 box ROTATION: 'cap defaults to 8 speakers', 'over-cap agents queue and rotate on the next /standup'

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'War Room text'.

name: warroom-voice-gemini.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'War Room — Voice Mode'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Gemini Live native audio, no Deepgram, no Cartesia'.

Five boxes flowing horizontally, arrow between each:

1. INPUT (blue #64B5F6 border)
   Title: 'Microphone'
   Body: 'browser captures 16kHz audio', 'Pipecat WebSocket transport'

2. WS PROXY (cyan #4FC3F7 border)
   Title: 'WebSocket /ws/warroom'
   Body: 'token-gated, single connection', 'binary audio frames + JSON control'

3. GEMINI LIVE (amber #FFB74D border)
   Title: 'Gemini Live LLMService'
   Body: 'speech-to-speech native', 'voice selected per agent (Charon, Kore, Puck, ...)', 'tools: answer_as_agent, mission delegation'

4. TOOLS (lavender #B39DDB border)
   Title: 'Inline + async handoff'
   Body: 'inline: get_time, list_agents, answer_as_agent', 'async: mission-cli queue → specialist agent → result'

5. OUTPUT (mint #81C784 border)
   Title: 'Speakers + transcript'
   Body: 'agent voice played back via WS', 'live transcript rail in dashboard', 'meeting persists to warroom_meetings'

A pink #F48FB1 box at the bottom titled 'MODES' with body: 'Direct mode: pin one agent, all input goes to them', 'Auto mode: hand-raise, classifier picks who answers'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'War Room voice (Gemini Live)'.

name: standup-picker.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Standup Roster Picker'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Reorder, toggle, cap, and rotate /standup speakers'.

Three horizontal boxes, cyan #4FC3F7 borders:

1. ORDER
   Title: 'Drag-reorder agent list'
   Body lines: 'numbered slots 1..N', 'arrow up / arrow down per row', 'first slot is the primary leader'

2. TOGGLE
   Title: 'In / out checkbox'
   Body lines: 'disabled rows are skipped entirely', 'opacity dim when disabled', 'list order preserved'

3. CAP
   Title: 'Max agents per turn'
   Body lines: 'slider 1..8 (SLASH_HARD_CAP)', 'header: "X will speak · Y in rotation · Z disabled"', 'each turn fits the 300s watchdog'

Below, an amber #FFB74D box titled 'ROTATION QUEUE' with body: 'when more agents enabled than the cap, /standup cycles through the rest on subsequent calls', 'agents past slot N show a faint "rotation queue" pill'.

A pink #F48FB1 box on the right titled 'AD-HOC' with body: '/standup @meta @research → only those two run', 'forceOrder skips saved config and canonical order entirely'.

Mint #81C784 footer box: 'Saved to dashboard_settings.standup_config — read by pickSlashRoster() in the orchestrator'.

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Standup picker'.

name: dashboard-personalization.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'Dashboard Personalization Layer'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Theme, scale, accent, workspace name — all per-install'.

A two-by-two grid of boxes:

1. THEME (cyan #4FC3F7 border)
   Title: 'Color theme'
   Body: 'dark / light / auto', 'accent applied to highlights, focus rings, badges'

2. ACCENT (amber #FFB74D border)
   Title: 'Custom hex accent'
   Body: 'pick from 6 preset accents or paste your own #hex', 'live-previews across the entire SPA'

3. SCALE (mint #81C784 border)
   Title: 'UI scale'
   Body: 'compact / cozy / comfortable', 'changes font and spacing globally'

4. WORKSPACE (lavender #B39DDB border)
   Title: 'Workspace name + sidebar'
   Body: 'rename your sidebar header', 'collapse sections', 'mission column order + widths'

A pink #F48FB1 footer box: 'all personalization persists via PATCH /api/dashboard/settings — JSON-validated, byte-capped, scoped to allowed keys.'

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Personalization'.

name: claudeclaw-overview.png
prompt:
Title at top in bold mono: 'ClaudeClaw at a Glance'. Subtitle in dim grey: 'Every surface, one bot, one machine'.

A central node labeled 'ClaudeClaw core (claude CLI + SQLite + skills)' with cyan #4FC3F7 border. Eight surfaces radiating outward, each in its own box with an arrow back to the core:

- TELEGRAM (blue #64B5F6) — Body: 'main bot + N agent bots', 'voice, photos, files, slash commands'
- DASHBOARD (cyan #4FC3F7) — Body: 'live web UI on :3141', 'Mission Control, Hive Mind, Memory, Agents'
- WAR ROOM TEXT (cyan #4FC3F7) — Body: '/standup, /discuss, agent rail', 'multi-agent group chat'
- WAR ROOM VOICE (amber #FFB74D) — Body: 'Gemini Live native audio', 'pin agent or hand-raise'
- LIVE MEETINGS (amber #FFB74D) — Body: 'Daily.co video room', 'Pika avatar agent joins'
- MISSION TASKS (mint #81C784) — Body: 'queued work for any agent', 'CLI + dashboard + auto-assign'
- SCHEDULED (mint #81C784) — Body: 'cron + plain English + visual editor', 'per-agent scoped'
- HIVE MIND (lavender #B39DDB) — Body: 'cross-agent activity log', '2D + 3D brain views'

A pink #F48FB1 footer box: 'Everything is local. SQLite database, Node bot, optional dashboard, optional war room. No cloud, no telemetry, no per-message API calls beyond the model itself.'

Footer bottom-left: 'ClaudeClaw'. Footer bottom-right: 'Architecture overview'.
